metadata.description: Curated sources for production RAG and search: retrieval methods, grounding/citations, evaluation, agentic RAG, and operational controls.

foundational_papers.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
foundational_papers.relevance: Foundational RAG architecture; useful for reasoning about retrieval vs generation responsibilities.

foundational_papers.name: Dense Passage Retrieval (DPR)
foundational_papers.relevance: Dense retrieval baseline; helpful for embedding-based retrieval design and evaluation.

foundational_papers.name: BEIR: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Zero-Shot Evaluation of Information Retrieval Models
foundational_papers.relevance: Benchmark and evaluation framing for retrieval models across diverse tasks and corpora.

foundational_papers.name: HyDE: Hypothetical Document Embeddings
foundational_papers.relevance: Query-side technique to improve dense retrieval when queries are underspecified.

foundational_papers.name: Seven Failure Points in RAG Systems
foundational_papers.relevance: Failure taxonomy for RAG stages (chunking, retrieval, reranking, synthesis, citations).

foundational_papers.name: Self-RAG
foundational_papers.relevance: Approach for deciding when to retrieve and how to use retrieved content; useful for adaptive retrieval design.

foundational_papers.name: ColBERT: Contextualized Late Interaction over BERT
foundational_papers.relevance: Late interaction retrieval achieving state-of-the-art precision; foundation for RAGatouille and multimodal variants.

foundational_papers.name: Enhancing RAG: A Study of Best Practices (Jan 2026)
foundational_papers.relevance: Systematic investigation of RAG optimization factors including chunk size, query expansion, and retrieval stride.

foundational_papers.name: Agentic RAG Survey
foundational_papers.relevance: Comprehensive survey of agentic RAG architectures with autonomous decision-making and iterative reasoning.

foundational_papers.name: Introduction to Information Retrieval
foundational_papers.relevance: Foundational IR concepts (ranking, BM25-style retrieval, evaluation) that underpin production search.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: FAISS
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Similarity search library used as a reference for ANN indexing and evaluation.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: pgvector
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Vector search in PostgreSQL; common choice when you already run Postgres.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: pgvectorscale (Timescale)
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: pgvector extension with StreamingDiskANN; competitive with dedicated vector DBs up to 50M vectors.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: RAGatouille
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Easy-to-use ColBERT integration for RAG pipelines; bridges research and practical implementation.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: Chonkie
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Chunking library with semantic and late chunking strategies; optimized for different document types.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: LanceDB
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Embedded vector database with serverless support; emerging option for local-first and edge applications.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: Elasticsearch Documentation
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Reference for sparse retrieval, hybrid search patterns, and ranking pipelines at scale.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: OpenSearch Documentation
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Open-source search stack reference for hybrid search and operational patterns.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: Sentence Transformers
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Open embedding model ecosystem; useful for dense retrieval baselines and evaluation.

implementation_docs_and_tools.name: Unstructured
implementation_docs_and_tools.relevance: Document parsing for PDFs/tables/images; useful for ingestion pipelines with mixed formats.

evaluation_frameworks.name: RAGAS
evaluation_frameworks.relevance: Industry-standard RAG evaluation with faithfulness, context precision/recall, and answer relevance metrics.

evaluation_frameworks.name: DeepEval
evaluation_frameworks.relevance: LLM evaluation framework with debuggable metrics; LLM judge reasoning visible for debugging.

evaluation_frameworks.name: TruLens
evaluation_frameworks.relevance: RAG evaluation and tracing with feedback functions; deep LangChain/LlamaIndex integration.

security_and_observability.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
security_and_observability.relevance: Threat categories for prompt injection via retrieved text and data leakage in RAG pipelines.

security_and_observability.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for GenAI
security_and_observability.relevance: Telemetry standard for RAG pipeline tracing (retrieval latency, tokens, model metadata).

security_and_observability.name: Anthropic Contextual Retrieval
security_and_observability.relevance: Chunk context augmentation technique; 49% reduction in retrieval failure with contextual embeddings + BM25.
